seo.title: Building AI Email Assistant with AutoGen + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build ai email assistant with AutoGen + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building an AI Email Assistant with AutoGen enables sophisticated multi-agent workflows for intent detection, draft generation, and approval processes. However, the conversational nature of AutoGen agents introduces risks like infinite loops, unsafe outputs, and incorrect decisions that could lead to sending inappropriate or confidential emails. Vex provides essential guardrails to verify PII filtering, tone, accuracy, and compliance before emails are dispatched.

architectureOverview.heading: AI Email Assistant Architecture with AutoGen
architectureOverview.description:
The AI Email Assistant uses AutoGen's multi-agent system where specialized agents collaborate: an IntentDetectorAgent classifies email purpose (reply, forward, draft), a DraftGeneratorAgent creates content with attachment handling, a ToneReviewerAgent ensures appropriate language, and an ApproverAgent validates before sending. Emails flow through this pipeline with human-in-the-loop for final approval. Vex integrates as a reply filter to catch failures at each agent handoff.

Agents communicate via AutoGen's GroupChatManager, which orchestrates debates and consensus-building. Common patterns include tool calls for email APIs (IMAP/SMTP) and LLM function calling for structured outputs. Risks amplify in multi-turn interactions where agents might loop or drift off-task.

risks.name: Infinite conversation loops between agents
risks.description: Agents endlessly debate email tone or content without converging, exhausting tokens and delaying responses
risks.mitigation: Vex monitors conversation turns and detects repetitive patterns, terminating loops

risks.name: PII leakage in generated drafts
risks.description: DraftGeneratorAgent includes sensitive data like SSNs or internal info in replies
risks.mitigation: Vex PII filtering scans all agent outputs before they propagate

risks.name: Inappropriate tone escalation
risks.description: Agents agree on sarcastic or aggressive language unsuitable for professional email
risks.mitigation: Vex tone analysis enforces professional communication standards

risks.name: Incorrect recipient validation
risks.description: Agents forward confidential emails to wrong recipients during attachment handling
risks.mitigation: Vex validates recipient domains and email patterns against allowlists

implementation.title: Set up AutoGen Agents for Email Pipeline
implementation.description: Create specialized agents for the email workflow with Vex-enabled reply functions
implementation.code:
from autogen import AssistantAgent, GroupChat, GroupChatManager
import vex

# Initialize Vex client
vex_client = vex.Client(api_key="your-vex-api-key")

intent_detector = AssistantAgent(
    name="IntentDetector",
    llm_config={"config_list": [{"model": "gpt-4", "api_key": "openai-key"}]},
    reply_filter=vex_client.filter(
        checks=["pii_filter", "content_accuracy"]
    )
)

draft_generator = AssistantAgent(
    name="DraftGenerator",
    system_message="Generate professional email drafts. Handle attachments safely.",
    reply_filter=vex_client.filter(checks=["tone_appropriateness", "confidentiality"])
)

groupchat = GroupChat(agents=[intent_detector, draft_generator], messages=[])
manager = GroupChatManager(groupchat=groupchat)

implementation.title: Email Intent Detection with Structured Output
implementation.description: IntentDetectorAgent classifies email purpose and extracts key metadata
implementation.code:
def handle_email_intent(sender, config):
    email_content = sender.last_message()["content"]
    
    response = intent_detector.initiate_chat(
        sender,
        message=f"Analyze this email: {email_content}. Classify intent: reply/forward/draft. Extract recipients and urgency.",
        max_turns=3
    )
    
    return {
        "intent": "reply",
        "recipients": ["client@company.com"],
        "urgency": "medium",
        "attachments": []
    }

intent_detector.register_reply(IntentDetector, handle_email_intent)

cta.heading: Secure Your AutoGen AI Email Assistant
cta.description: Install Vex today with `pip install autogen vex-sdk` and protect your email workflows from agent failures.
